title: Dictionary Key
description: Implement key-value storage using Dictionaries to retrieve values based on unique identifiers.
problemStatement:
Stock check! Create a dictionary named `inventory` where keys are strings (product names) and values are integers (quantity). Set `"Apples"` to `10`. Then, print the quantity of `"Apples"`.

**Requirement:** Use dictionary literal syntax `[Key: Value]` to initialize.
hints: Dictionary access returns an optional value because the key might not exist.
